title: taraxacum caucasicum
intro: Taraxacum caucasicum, also known as Caucasian dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum caucasicum include its potential to reduce blood pressure, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves can also be used as a food ingredient in various recipes.
